text.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; fill: rgb(34, 36, 42);
text.tspan: Administrator-led setup precedes any transaction. Per master, the admin chooses individual create or bulk import (all-or-nothing: any file/header/row/persistence error rejects the whole import with row-numbered reasons, even valid rows). RBAC = deduplicated union of role + user-grant +

designation + business-unit + super-admin 'all'. The approval chain, routing rules, per-approver limits, budgets per cost-center x period, and the dynamic field config (by stage/scope/purchaseType, mandatory, isAuto) are configuration, not code. Base/reporting currency is set first because all
thresholds and analytics compute in base. Suppliers/items default PENDING_ONBOARDING. Without routing rules and budgets, downstream routing and commitment fail.
